nodes.label: Meridian 3PL White (Reversed) Logo
nodes.description: White reversed/knockout version of the Meridian 3PL logo — same compass rose icon and wordmark as the primary logo but rendered entirely in white for use on dark or coloured backgrounds (e.g. dark hero images, navy headers, footer sections). The structure is identical: compass rose icon above '3PL MERIDIAN' text lockup. Transparent background.

brand_elements.usage: Dark backgrounds, hero overlays, footers, navy sections
